projects.unsafe_or_unsuitable_parts: Do not directly integrate the product or copy implementation; use only the local-first preprocessing pattern.
projects.primary_problem_solved: 100% client-side local PDF to Markdown conversion before downstream AI or KB ingestion.
projects.architecture_pattern: Browser-local PDF parsing to Markdown with no document upload to servers.
projects.reusable_capability: Pattern reference for privacy-first local PDF preprocessing and token-cost reduction.
projects.mapped_heitang_module: parsers, parser_backends, future token lifecycle reports

projects.unsafe_or_unsuitable_parts: Do not copy code, prompts, or repository-specific templates.
projects.primary_problem_solved: Agent memory persistence and retrieval patterns.
projects.architecture_pattern: Layered memory store with explicit memory operations.
projects.reusable_capability: Memory lifecycle vocabulary and promotion workflow inspiration.

projects.unsafe_or_unsuitable_parts: Do not copy code, prompts, or repository-specific templates.
projects.primary_problem_solved: Skill packaging examples and reusable agent skill conventions.
projects.architecture_pattern: Repository-hosted skill files with task-specific instructions.
projects.reusable_capability: Skill package surface-area checklist inspiration.

projects.unsafe_or_unsuitable_parts: Do not copy code, prompts, or repository-specific templates.
projects.primary_problem_solved: A narrowly scoped skill package example.
projects.architecture_pattern: Small single-skill repository with explicit behavior boundary.
projects.reusable_capability: Skill scope minimalism and packaging test inspiration.

projects.unsafe_or_unsuitable_parts: Do not copy code, prompts, or repository-specific templates.
projects.primary_problem_solved: Token and context compression for agent workflows.
projects.architecture_pattern: Runtime context trimming and compression before model calls.
projects.reusable_capability: Context budget diagnostics and compression-status contract inspiration.

projects.unsafe_or_unsuitable_parts: Too broad for direct adoption; avoid importing chain runtime complexity into v3.6.
projects.primary_problem_solved: Composable LLM application and RAG chains.
projects.architecture_pattern: Retriever abstractions, query transformers, multi-query retrievers, and runnable chains.
projects.reusable_capability: Pattern reference for query rewrite, multi-query retrieval, and retrieval planning contracts.

projects.unsafe_or_unsuitable_parts: Framework breadth and provider assumptions exceed current local Core needs.
projects.primary_problem_solved: Data indexing and RAG query engine framework.
projects.architecture_pattern: Index/query engine separation with fusion, rerank, and evaluation modules.
projects.reusable_capability: Pattern reference for index separation, evidence selection, and retrieval evaluation.

projects.unsafe_or_unsuitable_parts: Direct dependency would add a large runtime surface.
projects.primary_problem_solved: RAG pipeline components for retrieval, ranking, and evaluation.
projects.architecture_pattern: Pipeline graph with retriever, ranker, reader/generator, and evaluator components.
projects.reusable_capability: Pattern reference for retrieval diagnostics and component-level evaluation.

projects.unsafe_or_unsuitable_parts: Heavy indexing pipeline and provider configuration are not appropriate for v3.6.
projects.primary_problem_solved: Graph-based retrieval and global/local search over corpora.
projects.architecture_pattern: Entity graph indexing with query-time local/global search modes.
projects.reusable_capability: Pattern reference for retrieval planning and evidence coverage scoring.

projects.unsafe_or_unsuitable_parts: Do not add as a hard dependency in v3.6; model/runtime size and GPU/CPU compatibility need review.
projects.primary_problem_solved: OCR recognition for scanned PDFs and image text extraction.
projects.architecture_pattern: OCR model pipeline for detection, recognition, and document understanding.
projects.reusable_capability: Pattern reference for OCR backend routing and scanned PDF handling.

projects.unsafe_or_unsuitable_parts: AGPL and heavy runtime make direct reuse unsuitable without legal and dependency review.
projects.primary_problem_solved: Complex document parsing from PDF/image/DOCX/PPTX/XLSX to Markdown/JSON.
projects.architecture_pattern: Layout-aware document parsing with tables, formulas, reading order, and structured output.
projects.reusable_capability: Pattern reference for complex layout parser routing and Markdown/JSON intermediate artifacts.

projects.unsafe_or_unsuitable_parts: GPL licensing and runtime dependencies require care; keep optional and local-only.
projects.primary_problem_solved: Convert complex documents to Markdown/JSON/chunks with layout-aware parsing.
projects.architecture_pattern: Document-to-Markdown parser backend with structured output and optional OCR/layout components.
projects.reusable_capability: Existing local adapter benchmark target for parser backend strategy.

projects.unsafe_or_unsuitable_parts: Runtime footprint should remain optional and never imply cloud document upload.
projects.primary_problem_solved: Parse complex documents into structured document formats, Markdown, and JSON.
projects.architecture_pattern: Optional parser backend with structured conversion and layout-aware output.
projects.reusable_capability: Existing local adapter benchmark target for document-to-structured-intermediate strategy.

projects.unsafe_or_unsuitable_parts: Evaluator model dependencies must remain optional.
projects.primary_problem_solved: LLM and RAG evaluation, tracing, and feedback functions.
projects.architecture_pattern: Evaluation records with feedback metrics and traceable run evidence.
projects.reusable_capability: Pattern reference for golden query sets and retrieval evaluation reports.

projects.unsafe_or_unsuitable_parts: Do not introduce an agent runtime in v3.6.
projects.primary_problem_solved: Stateful agent graph runtime.
projects.architecture_pattern: Explicit graph nodes, edges, state, checkpoints, and resumable execution.
projects.reusable_capability: Pattern reference for future local agent runtime contracts.

projects.unsafe_or_unsuitable_parts: Evaluation models/providers must remain optional and no network may be required in tests.
projects.primary_problem_solved: RAG evaluation metrics including faithfulness, answer relevance, and context precision/recall.
projects.architecture_pattern: Metric-driven evaluation over questions, answers, contexts, and references.
projects.reusable_capability: Pattern reference for grounding evaluation and knowledge accuracy scoring.

projects.unsafe_or_unsuitable_parts: Do not copy evaluation prompts, datasets, or implementation; web retrieval assumptions need review.
projects.primary_problem_solved: Atomic factual claim evaluation against retrieved evidence.
projects.architecture_pattern: Break generated text into atomic facts and score support against evidence.
projects.reusable_capability: Pattern reference for claim extraction and claim-level verification reports.

projects.unsafe_or_unsuitable_parts: Benchmark data and task-specific code require separate license and dataset review.
projects.primary_problem_solved: Fact verification benchmark patterns for supported, refuted, and not-enough-info claims.
projects.architecture_pattern: Claim classification against evidence with contradiction/refutation labels.
projects.reusable_capability: Pattern reference for contradiction detection and user-facing trust status.

projects.unsafe_or_unsuitable_parts: Runtime and cloud/provider assumptions exceed v3.6 non-goals.
projects.primary_problem_solved: Multi-agent runtime and agent studio style orchestration.
projects.architecture_pattern: Conversable agents, group coordination, tools, and studio-facing runtime objects.
projects.reusable_capability: Pattern reference for mother/child operational contracts and workbench status surfaces.

projects.unsafe_or_unsuitable_parts: UI and IDE integration are outside v3.6.
projects.primary_problem_solved: Local-first developer workbench for AI coding assistants.
projects.architecture_pattern: Configurable local IDE extension with model/provider abstraction and tool contracts.
projects.reusable_capability: Pattern reference for local workbench contract drift prevention.

licensing_risk_summary: Do not copy external code, prompts, datasets, or repo-specific skill text.
Use only architecture patterns unless license and attribution review is completed.
Repositories with unverified license metadata remain manual-review only.
recommended_absorptions: Adopt pattern-level query planning and multi-query evaluation concepts in v3.7-v3.8.
Adopt pattern-level memory lifecycle and writeback review concepts in v3.9-v3.10.
Adopt local workbench contract completeness checks in v4.0.
rejected_patterns: Cloud-required defaults for local user data.
Opaque agent runtime loops before Core contracts and diagnostics are stable.
Direct prompt or skill text copying from external repositories.
